message:
fix(tests): fix 12 test failures on macOS + test isolation

concurrency/lifecycle: Replace Linux-only /proc/{pid} PID checks with
portable libc::kill(pid, 0) which works on all Unix platforms including
macOS. Falls back to conservative "assume alive" on non-Unix.

runtime (test isolation): Give each runtime test its own tempdir-backed
index directory instead of sharing a global .frankensearch/ dir. Prevents
tantivy file conflicts when tests run concurrently.

runtime (macOS paths): Canonicalize tempdir paths before comparison to
handle macOS /var → /private/var symlink transparently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
